title: Supervise sampling, inspections and testing at construction sites
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Supervise sampling, inspections and testing at construction sites demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria.

elements.title: Prepare for on-site operations

pcs.text: Identify the job, consult with the client and obtain required drawings, specifications and information about level of supervision required
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify the job, consult with the client and obtain required drawings, specifications and information about level of supervision required?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify the job, consult with the client and obtain required drawings, specifications and information about level of supervision required.

pcs.text: Select equipment and materials required for the job
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Select equipment and materials required for the job?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Select equipment and materials required for the job.

pcs.text: Identify site hazards and personal protective equipment (PPE) and safety procedures specified for job
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify site hazards and personal protective equipment (PPE) and safety procedures specified for job?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify site hazards and personal protective equipment (PPE) and safety procedures specified for job.

pcs.text: Organise any required site induction for self and support personnel in accordance with workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Organise any required site induction for self and support personnel in accordance with workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Organise any required site induction for self and support personnel in accordance with workplace procedures.

pcs.text: Record description of the job to be undertaken, compare with specification and resolve any variations
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Record description of the job to be undertaken, compare with specification and resolve any variations?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Record description of the job to be undertaken, compare with specification and resolve any variations.

pcs.text: Select suitable transport for site access
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Select suitable transport for site access?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Select suitable transport for site access.

pcs.text: Brief support personnel on job-specific requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Brief support personnel on job-specific requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Brief support personnel on job-specific requirements.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Set up facilities for supervision, testing and sample storage in accordance with site procedures.
